debug_info.goal:
case pos
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2)
n : ℕ
hn : 2 ^ (n + 1) < p
i : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input : Var fieldPair (F p)
x y : F p
h_input : Expression.eval env input.1 = x ∧ Expression.eval env input.2 = y
assumptions : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n ∧ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n
h_holds : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n → env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0
this : 2 ^ n < 2 ^ (n + 1)
hy✝ : ZMod.val y + ZMod.val 1 < p
hy : ZMod.val y + 1 = 2 ^ n
⊢ env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y then 1 else 0

failed_attempts:
simpa using hx0
      have hy' : y = 0 := by
        apply ZMod.val_injective
        simpa using hy0
      subst hx
      subst hy'
      simp

have hle : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have : ZMod.val x < 2^n := hx
        omega
      simp [hget, hle]

rw [this]
      have : ¬ ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have : ZMod.val y = 2 ^ n - 1 := by omega
        rw [this]
        exact not_le_of_gt hx
      simp [this]

have : env.get (i + n + 1) = 1 := by
        have : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hx
        simpa [this] using h_holds (by omega)
      simp [this, hxy]

omega
        simpa [hx_lt] using this
      have hite : (if ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y then (1 : F p) else 0) = 1 := by
        simp [hx_le]
      simpa [hite] using hget
simp [hxy, this]

have hle : (ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y) = False := by
        apply propext
        constructor
        · intro h
          have : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_of_le h
          exact (hxy this).elim
        · intro h
          exact False.elim h
      have hyval : ZMod.val y = 2^n - 1 := by omega
      have hle' : (ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y) := by
        have : ZMod.val x ≤ 2^n - 1 := by omega
        simpa [hyval] using this
      have : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_of_le hle'
      exact (hxy this).elim

cases assumptions with
    | intro hx hylt =>
      have hx' : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n := hx
      have hy' : ZMod.val y = 2 ^ n - 1 := by omega
      have hxy : ¬ ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by
        have : ZMod.val y + 1 = 2 ^ n := by simpa using hy
        simpa [this] using (not_lt_of_ge hx'.le)
      have hget : env.get (i + n + 1) = 0 := by
        have : ¬ (ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n) := by omega
        exact (h_holds (by omega)).trans (by simp [hxy])
      have hxle : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have : ZMod.val x ≤ 2 ^ n - 1 := by omega
        simpa [hy'] using this
      simp [hget, hxle]
simp [hx, hxy]

have : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_of_le hxy_le
        have : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n := by simpa [hy] using this
        exact (Nat.lt_irrefl _) (lt_of_lt_of_eq this hy.symm)
      simp [hle]
      have : env.get (i + n + 1) = 0 := by
        classical
        by_contra h
        have : env.get (i + n + 1) = 1 := by
          have := congrArg (fun t => t) h
          simp at this
        exact False.elim (by simpa [this] using h)
      simp [this]

cases assumptions with
    | intro hx hylt =>
      have hxle : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have : ZMod.val x < 2^n := hx
        have : ZMod.val x ≤ 2^n - 1 := by omega
        have : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
          have : ZMod.val y = 2^n - 1 := by omega
          omega
        exact this
      have hxlt : ¬ ZMod.val x < 2^n := by omega
      have hylt' : ¬ ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by
        have : ZMod.val y + 1 = 2^n := by omega
        simpa [this] using hxlt
      have : env.get (i + n + 1) = 0 := by
        have : env.get (i + n + 1) = (if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0) := by
          exact h_holds (by omega)
        simpa [hylt', ite_false] using this
      have : if ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y then (1 : F p) else 0 = 1 := by
        simp [hxle]
      simpa [this] using this.symm ▸ this

have hspec : (if x.val ≤ y.val then (1 : F p) else 0) = 1 := by
        simp [hxle]
      have hgoal : (if x.val < y.val + 1 then (1 : F p) else 0) = 0 := by
        simp [hxlt']
      have henv : env.get (i + n + 1) = 0 := by
        have : ¬ (y.val + 1 < 2^n) := by omega
        have := (h_holds (by omega)).trans rfl
        simpa [hgoal] using h_holds (by omega)
      have : (if x.val ≤ y.val then (1 : F p) else 0) = 0 := by
        simp [hxle] at henv
        simpa [hxle] using congrArg (fun t => t) henv
      simp [hxle] at this

case pos =>
      have hx0 : ZMod.val x = 0 := by
        have : ZMod.val x < 1 := by
          have : 2^n ≤ 1 := by
            have : 2^n ≤ y.val + 1 := by omega
            simpa [hy] using this
          have hx' : ZMod.val x < 2^n := assumptions.left
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le hx' this
        omega
      have hymax : ZMod.val y = 2^n - 1 := by omega
      have hxmax : x = 0 := by
        apply ZMod.val_injective
        simpa [hx0] using rfl
      subst hxmax
      have : ZMod.val (0 : F p) ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have : 0 ≤ (ZMod.val y : ℤ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
        exact Nat.zero_le _
      simp [hx0, this]

end LessEqThan

have hxlt2 : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by omega
      have hylt : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n := by omega
      have := h_holds hylt
      simp [hxlt2, hx] at this
      simpa [hx] using this

have hxlt : x.val < y.val + 1 := by omega
      have hlt : env.get (i + n + 1) = 1 := by
        have : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n → env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0 := h_holds
        have hs : env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0 := by
          apply this
          omega
        simpa [hxlt] using hs
      have : (if ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y then 1 else 0 : F p) = 1 := by
        simp [hxy]
      simpa [this] using hlt

have hle : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have hy' : ZMod.val y = 2 ^ n - 1 := by omega
        omega
      have : env.get (i + n + 1) = 1 := by
        have hylt : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n := by omega
        have := h_holds hylt
        simpa [hxy] using this
      simp [this, hle]

simpa [hxy] using h_holds
      have hle : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by omega
      simp [hle, hget]

have hxle : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n := hx
        have : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by simpa [hy] using this
        exact Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp this
      have hlt_eval : env.get (i + n + 1) = (1 : F p) :=
        by
          have hsmall : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n := by
            have : (2 ^ n : ℕ) < 2 ^ n := by simpa [hy] using (Nat.lt_succ_self y.val)
            exact (Nat.lt_irrefl _ this).elim
          exact (h_holds hsmall).trans (by simp [hxy])
      have : (if ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y then (1 : F p) else 0) = (1 : F p) := by
        simp [hxle]
      simpa [this] using hlt_eval

have hxle : ¬ ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have : ZMod.val y < ZMod.val x := by
          have hylt : ZMod.val y + 1 ≤ 2 ^ n := by simpa [hy]
          have hylt' : ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n := by
            have := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self (ZMod.val y)) hylt
            simpa [Nat.succ_eq_add_one] using this
          exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hylt' (Nat.le_of_lt hx0)
        exact not_le_of_gt this
      have hltv : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n → env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0 := h_holds
      have : env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0 := by
        have : ¬ (ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n) := by simpa [hy] using (lt_irrefl (2 ^ n))
        exact hltv.elim this
      simp [this, hxy, hxle]

end LessEqThan

have : env.get (i + n + 1) = 1 := by
        have : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by simpa using hx
        simp [h_holds (by omega), this]
      simp [this, hxle]

exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hx) this)
      have hlt' : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 = True := by
        simp [hx]
      have : env.get (i + n + 1) = 1 := by
        have hy' : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2^n := by omega
        exact (by simpa [hx] using h_holds hy')
      simp [this, hxy]

specialize h_holds this
        have : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by omega
        simpa [this] using h_holds
      simpa [this]
simpa [hspec] using hout

have hxle : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have hxlt : ZMod.val x < 2^n := assumptions.left
        have hyEq : ZMod.val y = 2^n - 1 := by omega
        omega
      have hxlt' : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by omega
      have hlt : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2^n := by omega
      have hout : env.get (i + n + 1) = (if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0) := h_holds hlt
      rw [hout]
      simp [hxle, hxlt']
omega

case pos =>
      have hx : ZMod.val x < 2^n := assumptions.1
      have hx' : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by omega
      have hget : env.get (i + n + 1) = 1 := by
        have : env.get (i + n + 1) = if ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 then 1 else 0 :=
          h_holds (by omega)
        simpa [hx'] using this
      have hxy : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by omega
      have hxy' : ¬ ZMod.val x > ZMod.val y := by omega
      have : (if ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y then (1 : F p) else 0) = 1 := by
        simp [hxy]
      simpa [this] using hget

exact (lt_irrefl _ this)
      have hout : env.get (i + n + 1) = 0 := by
        have : ¬ ZMod.val y + 1 < 2^n := by omega
        have := h_holds
        simp [this] at this
        simpa [hxy] using this
      simp [hle, hout]

case pos =>
      have hx : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n := assumptions.left
      have hxy : ¬ ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by
        have : ZMod.val y + 1 ≤ ZMod.val x := by
          omega
        exact not_lt_of_ge this
      have hx_le_y : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        have : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n := hx
        have : ZMod.val x ≤ 2 ^ n - 1 := by omega
        have : ZMod.val x ≤ ZMod.val y := by
          have : 2 ^ n - 1 ≤ ZMod.val y := by omega
          exact le_trans this this
        exact this
      have hlt_val : ZMod.val x < ZMod.val y + 1 := by
        exact Nat.lt_succ_iff.mpr hx_le_y
      have hlt : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n := by
        omega
      specialize h_holds hlt
      simp [h_holds, hlt_val, hx_le_y]
simp [hxy, hle]

have : (if x.val ≤ y.val then (1 : F p) else 0) = 1 := by
        simp [hxy]
      have : (if x.val ≤ y.val then (1 : F p) else 0) = 0 := by
        simpa [hout, hxy] using congrArg (fun z => z) rfl
      simp [hxy] at hout
      simpa [hxy] using hout
